name: 574 Core Grey

description: Premium Made in USA running shoe, grey with navy accents. The gold standard of quality, clean minimalist look.

description: Retro basketball sneaker with leather upper, white and green. Clean preppy court style, versatile.

name: 2002R Rain Cloud
description: Y2K-inspired runner with N-ERGY cushioning, rain cloud colorway. Futuristic chunky aesthetic, muted tones.

description: Futuristic trail-inspired runner with silver and blue. Techwear aesthetic, bold and eye-catching.

name: Fresh Foam X 1080v13
description: Premium performance running shoe with maximum cushioning. Sporty, technical, built for runners.

name: 9060 Sea Salt
description: Chunky futuristic silhouette in soft cream and beige tones. Cozy gorpcore vibes, organic shapes.

name: 530 White Silver
description: Sleek Y2K runner in white with silver accents. Clean, minimal, futuristic streetwear staple.
